item.title: Introduction to Domain-Driven Design (DDD)
item.description: Designing software nowadays can be such a tough job, we know. Software complexity has raised and it is still raising reaching summits above the havoc. All this wave of fe…

item.title: Understanding Linux Containers: explore User Space, cgroups and Namespaces
item.description: What is a container? Actually, it is not a real thing. In this post, I will try to explain what containers are and how they work, decomposing them and understanding their…
